title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
optimized_headline: Discover Preply's Unique Blend of AI and Human Tutors for Tailored Learning
raw_excerpt: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
raw_body: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
speedrun: Preply has integrated OpenAI to enhance its tutoring services by offering AI-generated lesson summaries. This feature provides personalized feedback and tailored language exercises for learners. By combining AI with human tutors, Preply aims to create a more effective learning experience. This approach could reshape how language education is delivered, making it more accessible and efficient.
why_it_matters: Language learners now have access to customized resources, which can enhance their study efficiency and engagement.
This move signals a trend towards blending AI with traditional teaching methods, potentially changing the landscape of educational technology.

lenses.eli12: Preply is using smart technology to help people learn languages better. Think of it like having a personal coach who gives you tailored advice after each practice session. This matters because it can make learning more enjoyable and effective for everyone, whether you’re a beginner or looking to improve.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this integration highlights a growing user need for personalized educational tools. By leveraging AI, companies can reduce costs and improve learning outcomes. This could lead to higher user satisfaction and retention rates as learners receive more relevant support.
lenses.engineer: Preply's use of OpenAI focuses on generating lesson summaries and personalized feedback, which enhances the learning process. This integration likely employs advanced natural language processing models to analyze user interactions and tailor content effectively. While the specifics of the models used aren't detailed, the approach demonstrates a significant shift towards AI-assisted education.
